title: calea zacatechichi var. rugosa
intro: Calea zacatechichi var. rugosa, also known as Mexican Dream Herb or Dream Herb, is a plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce a dreamy state and promote relaxation, which is attributed to its alkaloid compounds, such as caleic acid. The health benefits of Calea zacatechichi var. rugosa include reduced stress and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and enhanced cognitive function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal effects.
